name: syntax-typography-starter
description: A typography-first website starter and lightweight design system.

scripts.lint:js: eslint js/config/font-pairs.js js/utilities/theme-toggle.js js/utilities/font-switcher.js js/components/navigation.js js/components/modal.js js/components/web-components.js js/main.js lab/lab.js consumer/index.mjs "consumer/**/*.mjs" scripts tests eslint.config.js playwright.config.js
scripts.lint:css: stylelint css/tokens.css css/reset.css css/themes.css css/style.css css/components/a11y.css css/components/grid.css css/components/modern-header.css css/components/sections.css css/components/features.css css/components/feature-card.css css/components/buttons.css css/components/controls.css css/components/modal.css demo/demo.css lab/lab.css "consumer/**/*.css"
scripts.format: prettier --write index.html demo/index.html demo/demo.css lab/index.html lab/lab.css lab/lab.js css/tokens.css css/reset.css css/themes.css css/style.css css/components/a11y.css css/components/grid.css css/components/modern-header.css css/components/sections.css css/components/features.css css/components/feature-card.css css/components/buttons.css css/components/controls.css css/components/modal.css js/config/font-pairs.js js/utilities/theme-toggle.js js/utilities/font-switcher.js js/components/navigation.js js/components/modal.js js/components/web-components.js js/main.js consumer scripts tests package.json eslint.config.js playwright.config.js .stylelintrc .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/ci.yml README.md docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md docs/COMPONENT_LAB.md docs/CONSUMER_MODE_PLAN.md docs/CONSUMER_MODE_OWNERSHIP.md docs/CONSUMER_RECIPES.md docs/CONSUMER_RECIPE_EVIDENCE.md docs/CONSUMER_SETUP.md docs/CONSUMER_SHIP.md v2-ideas.md CHANGELOG.md site.webmanifest
scripts.format:check: prettier --check index.html demo/index.html demo/demo.css lab/index.html lab/lab.css lab/lab.js css/tokens.css css/reset.css css/themes.css css/style.css css/components/a11y.css css/components/grid.css css/components/modern-header.css css/components/sections.css css/components/features.css css/components/feature-card.css css/components/buttons.css css/components/controls.css css/components/modal.css js/config/font-pairs.js js/utilities/theme-toggle.js js/utilities/font-switcher.js js/components/navigation.js js/components/modal.js js/components/web-components.js js/main.js consumer scripts tests package.json eslint.config.js playwright.config.js .stylelintrc .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/ci.yml README.md docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md docs/COMPONENT_LAB.md docs/CONSUMER_MODE_PLAN.md docs/CONSUMER_MODE_OWNERSHIP.md docs/CONSUMER_RECIPES.md docs/CONSUMER_RECIPE_EVIDENCE.md docs/CONSUMER_SETUP.md docs/CONSUMER_SHIP.md v2-ideas.md CHANGELOG.md site.webmanifest
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:consumer-setup
